title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: Everyone knows it takes energy to make a car go faster. But what if a car could get some of that energy back when it slows down? In the electric drive, that's exactly what its recuperation feature does.

title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: A conventional car uses gasoline to turn energy into power and power into motion. The uses electricity for fuel to give you around 85 miles of zero emission driving on a single charge of its advanced battery. Every time you accelerate, the battery uses its charge, or stored energy, to power the car's electric motor.

title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: Much the way driving a regular car uses up a tank of gas, driving the electric depletes its battery charge. Instead of refilling a gas tank, you recharge the battery by plugging it in. When you take your foot off the accelerator in a gasoline car, you use less gas, but the engine is still running.

title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: So even when you're slowing down, you continue to burn fuel. The can recapture energy when it's slowing down, with the turning wheels acting as generators. It's called recuperation because it puts some charge back into the battery.

title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: Recuperation occurs virtually anytime you take your foot off the accelerator or step on the brake. It also helps slow the car down as it recaptures energy, much like the feeling you get when you downshift a gasoline car. With the optional recuperation paddles, the is the first electric vehicle to use radar to optimize how it recaptures energy.

title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: Using the same radar sensor as its collision prevention system, it watches how far you are from the vehicle ahead. When you lift off the pedal, it automatically adjusts recuperation to the ideal level. It does not apply the brakes nor control your following distance.

title: Mercedes Benz Mercedes Benz Technology — B Class Electric Drive Recuperation (1080p 30fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: Its focus is maximizing energy recovery to increase the battery charge and therefore your driving range. The recuperation paddles are a lot like the shift paddles in a gas-powered. But instead of changing gears, they engage any of four modes.

title: Porsche All you need to know about the new Porsche Panamera (1080p 25fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: More than ever before, the new is bringing together two opposing characteristics: the performance of a sports car and the comfort of a luxury saloon. It is this symbiosis that makes the. The second generation is a completely new development.

title: Porsche All you need to know about the new Porsche Panamera (1080p 25fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: In my opinion, the successor vehicle in the line is characterized by three columns, three directions that guided our development. Secondly, performance, where the brand promise of the vehicle positions it as the sportiest vehicle in the luxury segment.

title: Porsche All you need to know about the new Porsche Panamera (1080p 25fps H264 128kbit AAC)
document: And thirdly, comfort. We've taken a significant step forward with the successor model, both in terms of rolling comfort and ride comfort, and in terms of redefining comfort for the occupants in the interior. We promised to offer the sportiest vehicle in the segment.

title: Porsche All you need to know about the new Porsche Panamera (1080p 25fps H264 128kbit AAC)
